title: NO SPOILERS Evangelion 333 on Blu ray and DVD April 24th
display_title: NO SPOILERS Evangelion 333 on Blu ray and DVD April 24th
wikitext:
[]: [NO SPOILERS] Evangelion 3.33 on Blu-ray and DVD April 24th             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon Feb 18, 2013 10:25 am Get ready kids, Evangelion 3.0 is coming to home video in Japan on April 24th, and you know what that means, right? The wait is almost over. Get excite. http://www.khara.co.jp/news/2013/02/000272.html

[]:             Quote Post by Seele00TextOnly » Mon Feb 18, 2013 10:29 am ...

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Mon Feb 18, 2013 10:30 am I have mixed feelings about this. Because I didn't expect it so soon I haven't budget it for in that timeframe so this will be mildly inconvenient. At the same time I laugh at the people that broke and gave in to the camrip within the last week or so. EDIT: lol no double posting. Seele00TextOnly check the link it is labled 3.33 and not 3.0.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Mon Feb 18, 2013 10:30 am http://neweva.blog103.fc2.com/blog-entry-2126.html http://extr.b-ch.com/cgi-bin/eva_news/official/news_det.cgi?news_c=11296 a) holy fuck this is quick b) this is dirt cheap, BD is only 6,090 yen. [s]c) LENGHT: 105 minutes + bonus footage (God Warrior short film is included at least)[/s] never mind Minna no Eva can't report shit, 105 minutes refers to combined lenght of God Warrior and Q. God Warrior short film is not counted as bonus material, in other words. The theatre cut was 96 mins minutes. There's 10 minutes of new footage, in other words. Jesus.

[]:             Quote Post by Seele00TextOnly » Mon Feb 18, 2013 10:35 am ...

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Mon Feb 18, 2013 10:37 am No amazon pre-order page yet. :(

[]:             Quote Post by pwhodges » Mon Feb 18, 2013 10:38 am Xard wrote: c) God Warrior short film is included d) LENGHT: [s] 105 minutes + bonus footage [/s]

[]:             Quote Post by hui43210 » Mon Feb 18, 2013 10:40 am OOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOHHHHHHHHHHHHH! You think this means we might see 4.0 by at least 2014, or am I just assuming shit?

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Mon Feb 18, 2013 10:45 am pwhodges wrote: Er, wasn't there loads of initial confusion over the length also because the short was included - so might that be the same confusion with the DVD?

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon Feb 18, 2013 10:46 am I'M SO FUCKING EXCITED YOU GUYS I get to post in the Rebuild sub-forum again!

[]:             Quote Post by pwhodges » Mon Feb 18, 2013 10:48 am Length from the Khara page (courtesy Google translate): 105 minutes this title ("Giant movie version badass soldier in Tokyo now:" 10 minutes "Evangelion: Q": · 95 minutes 7 seconds)

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Mon Feb 18, 2013 10:53 am http://www.animenewsnetwork.com/news/2013-02-18/evangelion-3.33-bd/dvd-to-add-ghibli-giant-god-warrior-short The official website for the Evangelion anime franchise announced on Tuesday that Evangelion: 3.0 You Can (Not) Redo, the third part in Hideaki Anno and Khara's new four-film version of Gainax's Neon Genesis Evangelion series, will ship on Blu-ray Disc and DVD on April 24. Similar to the previous films, the third film has been renamed "Evangelion: 3.33 You Can (Not) Redo" for its home video release. Both the Blu-ray and DVD will contain the 95-minute feature itself and 10-minute, 7-second "Kyoshinhei Tokyo ni Arawaru" (Giant God Warrior Appears in Tokyo) short. The live-action tokusatsu (special-effects) short was developed by Anno, produced by Studio Ghibli, and screened with Evangelion: 3.0 You Can (Not) Redo film in theaters. Both home video versions will also have the Rebuild of Evangelion:3.33 documentary, the teaser trailer, the full trailer, the television commercials, and the "3.33 ver." of the dialogue recording script. The Blu-ray will have the Japanese soundtrack in Linear PCM 5.1ch and Linear PCM 2.0ch, while the DVD will have the Japanese soundtack in Dolby Digital/5.1ch and Dolby Digital/2.0 Surround. (The extras on the Blu-ray and DVD will be in Linear PCM 2.0ch and Dolby Digital/2.0 Surround, respectively.) Both versions will have Japanese subtitles. King Records will offer the Blu-ray for 6,090 yen (about US$66) at retail, while the DVD version will retail for 5,985 yen (US$65). Each will come in Digipak packaging with a special box and a booklet. The first copies of each will also bundle an original soundtrack CD with Hikaru Utada's theme song "Sakura Nagashi." ********* The reason I assumed there was 10 minutes of new footage was other places putting the contents like this: 本編 105分＋映像特典 aka 105 main feature + bonus materials. It never occured to me they'd count God Warrior short as part of main feature.

[]:             Quote Post by Giji Shinka » Mon Feb 18, 2013 10:54 am Hooooooooooooooooooooooly shit! I'm SO hyped about this! 10 more minutes included???!!.......................My life is completed. OOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOHHHHHHHHHHHHH! You think this means we might see 4.0 by at least 2014, or am I just assuming shit?

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Mon Feb 18, 2013 10:58 am Giji Shinka wrote: Hooooooooooooooooooooooly shit! I'm SO hyped about this! 10 more minutes included???!!...............My life is completed.

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Mon Feb 18, 2013 11:03 am Xard wrote: Both versions will have Japanese subtitles.

[]:             Quote Post by PainXIII12 » Mon Feb 18, 2013 11:19 am Xard wrote: http://neweva.blog103.fc2.com/blog-entry-2126.html http://extr.b-ch.com/cgi-bin/eva_news/official/news_det.cgi?news_c=11296 a) holy fuck this is quick b) this is dirt cheap, BD is only 6,090 yen. [s]c) LENGHT: 105 minutes + bonus footage (God Warrior short film is included at least)[/s] never mind Minna no Eva can't report shit, 105 minutes refers to combined lenght of God Warrior and Q. God Warrior short film is not counted as bonus material, in other words. The theatre cut was 96 mins minutes. There's 10 minutes of new footage, in other words. Jesus.

[]:             Quote Post by riffraff11235 » Mon Feb 18, 2013 11:22 am The Eva Monkey wrote: I'M SO FUCKING EXCITED YOU GUYS I get to post in the Rebuild sub-forum again!

[]:             Quote Post by A.T. Fish » Mon Feb 18, 2013 11:39 am Unspoiled people, rejoice! Finally a deadline. Part of me regrets having succumbed to the temptation of the camrip but the other part understands that the curiosity was unbearable.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon Feb 18, 2013 11:41 am A.T. Fish wrote: Unspoiled people, rejoice!

[]:             Quote Post by Mishrak » Mon Feb 18, 2013 11:42 am There was simply no way to avoid it for me. As soon as a whole version of the movie was out, I had to see it. As bad (decent for a camrip) as it was. Can't wait for a good version to be up!
